mapper.select:
SELECT -- 总消息数 ((SELECT COUNT(id) FROM user_msg) + (SELECT COUNT(id) FROM group_messages) + (SELECT COUNT(id) FROM sys_notice)) AS totalMsg, -- 今日新消息数（如需今日，把 date_sub(...) 改为 curdate()） ( (SELECT COUNT(id) FROM user_msg WHERE DATE(send_time) = CURDATE()) + (SELECT COUNT(id) FROM group_messages where DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()) + (SELECT COUNT(id) FROM sys_notice where DATE(create_time) = CURDATE())) AS todayNewMsg, -- 今日新用户数（status=1 为有效用户，如需今日，把 date_sub(...) 改为 curdate()） (SELECT COUNT(id) FROM user WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE() AND status = 1) AS todayNewUser, -- 总有效用户数 (SELECT COUNT(id) FROM user WHERE status = 1) AS totalUser
FROM DUAL; -- dual 虚拟表，用于返回单行多列的结果,表示用于无物理表但需要 FROM 子句的场景，保证语法合规
